design_notes: The chart is built as a balanced and rhythmic Hard/Heavy step pattern. Low energy intro and build-down outro utilize sparse taps and breather stops. High energy peak segments during drops are mapped with continuous streams, moderating crossover intensity and adding holds over vocal/synth sustains to create satisfying tension and release. Density scales proportionally with the track's per-bar energy, keeping within the strict 8.0 NPS budget.

phrases.intent: intro build-up/warmup with very sparse taps
introducing rhythms, building up to the main drop
first drop, heavy streams with moderate crossovers
maintaining momentum through the second half of Drop 1
absolute peak of Drop 1, adding jumps on strong accents
cooling down slightly after the heavy drops
slow build-down before the outro, highlighting vocal chops/synth hits
ultra quiet outro with fading steps
